name: Pea Souffle
recipeIngredient: 100 grams cream cheese, cut into blocks
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 200°C.
2. Butter two 1/2-liter (2-cup) souffle dishes.
3. Drain the peas.
4. Use a blender or food processor to puree 3/4 of the peas.
5. Add the cream cheese [cut into blocks] and blend again.
6. Add the grated cheese, Italian herbs, and egg yolks and blend again.
7. Transfer to a bowl and stir in the remaining peas.
8. Add salt and pepper to taste.
9. Beat the egg whites until stiff.
10. Fold into the pea mixture.
11. Divide the pea mixture between the souffle dishes.
12. Place in the middle of the oven and bake for about 20 minutes, until cooked through and golden.
13. Serve with fries and mixed salad.
